name: Purge the Dungeon
description: A Skeleton Warrior has taken hold of the Obsidian Dungeon south of the Dark Forest. Destroy it and clear the road.
accept_text: Captain Bren nods curtly. 'Good. The dungeon entrance is south through the dark forest. Get in, kill it, get out. I won't be sending a search party if you don't come back.'
complete_text: Quest complete: Purge the Dungeon! The road through the Obsidian Dungeon is clear.
